Submodules

fundraisers.admin module

Django admin configuration for the fundraisers application.

Registers models in the admin interface to allow staff users to view and manage fundraisers records.

fundraisers.apps module

fundraisers.forms module

class fundraisers.forms.AddFundraisingAnnouncementForm(*args, **kwargs)

Bases: ModelForm

Form for creating announcements.

title

Announcement title.

target_sum

Amount needed to reach the fundraising goal.

description

Main information about announcement.

photo

Photo representing the announcement.

operational_direction

The operational direction where the supported unit is deployed.

unit

Supported unit.

base_fields = {'description': <django.forms.fields.CharField object>, 'operational_direction': <django.forms.fields.CharField object>, 'photo': <django.forms.fields.ImageField object>, 'target_sum': <django.forms.fields.DecimalField object>, 'title': <django.forms.fields.CharField object>, 'unit': <django.forms.models.ModelChoiceField object>}
declared_fields = {'description': <django.forms.fields.CharField object>, 'operational_direction': <django.forms.fields.CharField object>, 'photo': <django.forms.fields.ImageField object>, 'target_sum': <django.forms.fields.DecimalField object>, 'title': <django.forms.fields.CharField object>, 'unit': <django.forms.models.ModelChoiceField object>}

Bases: Form

Form for searching announcements.

search

Search query.

base_fields = {'search': <django.forms.fields.CharField object>}
declared_fields = {'search': <django.forms.fields.CharField object>}

fundraisers.models module

class fundraisers.models.FundraisingAnnouncement(*args, **kwargs)

Bases: Model

Represents a fundraising announcement.

Stores information about a fundraising campaign, including title, author, target and current amounts, description, optional photo, related unit, and status (open or closed).

title

Announcement title.

author

User that created this announcement.

current_sum

Amount of money already collected.

target_sum

Amount of money needed to reach the fundraising goal.

description

Main information about the announcement.

photo

Photo representing the announcement.

operational_direction

The operational direction where the supported unit is deployed.

unit

Foreign key to supported unit.

is_closed

Indicates whether the announcement is closed or open for donations.

date

Date when the announcement was created.

id

A wrapper for a deferred-loading field. When the value is read from this object the first time, the query is executed.

payments

Accessor to the related objects manager on the reverse side of a many-to-one relation.

In the example:

class Child(Model):
    parent = ForeignKey(Parent, related_name='children')

Parent.children is a ReverseManyToOneDescriptor instance.

Most of the implementation is delegated to a dynamically defined manager class built by create_reverse_many_to_one_manager() defined below.

fundraisers.tests module

fundraisers.urls module

URL configuration for the fundraisers application.

This module defines view routes for: - Announcement page. - Page for creating announcements. - Page with all announcements.

fundraisers.views module

fundraisers.views.fundraising_announcement(request, announcement_id)

Get requested announcement and render corresponding template.

class fundraisers.views.CreateAnnouncementView(**kwargs)

Bases: LoginRequiredMixin, CreateView

Handle form for creating a new fundraising announcement.

template_name = 'fundraisers/create_announcement.html'
model

alias of FundraisingAnnouncement

form_class

alias of AddFundraisingAnnouncementForm

success_url = '/'
login_url = '/users/login/'
form_valid(form)

Set current user as the author of the form.

class fundraisers.views.AnnouncementsView(**kwargs)

Bases: ListView

Display list of announcements.

template_name = 'fundraisers/announcements.html'
queryset = <QuerySet [<FundraisingAnnouncement: asd>, <FundraisingAnnouncement: 55555>, <FundraisingAnnouncement: fff>, <FundraisingAnnouncement: tgergt>, <FundraisingAnnouncement: ПВІПВІП>, <FundraisingAnnouncement: QQQQQQQ>, <FundraisingAnnouncement: das>, <FundraisingAnnouncement: ZBIR>, <FundraisingAnnouncement: 1>, <FundraisingAnnouncement: каів>]>
paginate_by = 15
ordering = '-date'
get_context_data(**kwargs)

Add SearchForm to the context.

get_queryset()

Filter queryset by user search request.
